discussion_comments.comment_body: For consistency, I would put this regex in 600 line with other regexes
I moved this to a function because the regex was very complicated and the linter was flagging it as a potential problem
You arent using this fn and zod doesnt have any other helper fns like this so ig this should be removed and the ZodString one is the way to go

@colinhacks I had to disable this line, because there are multiple different eslint complaints about the regex here
I wanted to first confirm whether you approve modifications of this regex based on eslint recommendations
If they don't change the behavior then I'm good with it. I assume the linter wouldn't recommend changes that substantially impact the regex.
should i do the changes or its done.
Make the change, duplication is never nice.
so i just overwrite my code with yours??

However you see fit, it is your PR.
I gave my oppinion, if code owners see it differently then they will comment so.

Why are you keeping the `(` and `)` on `(s)` if now you know it must be plural?

Maybe:
```suggestion
          } ${issue.minimum} character${issue.minimum>1 ? "s" : ""}`;  
```
?

Also, in English, `0` quantities should also be pluralized: we say `0 apples`, not `0 apple`.
I have made the changes. Please have a look and let me know if any further changes are required.
Looks better, it's up to maintainers to approve and merge this PR.
